solution:
Bond order of the covalent molecule, AX is given as 2.5, As AX  is a covalent diatomic molecule of second row elements of periodic table we can consider CO, NO  but bond order of CO having 14  electrons which is isoelectronic to nitrogen should be equal to 3 and NO  having 15 electrons will have a bond order of 2.5.

Molecular orbital configuration and bond order calculation of NO is

ABMO= antibonding molecular orbital

Bond order =Number of bonding electrons - number of anti bonding electrons.

question: A ball of mass 10 kg moving with a velocity 103 m s-1 along the x -axis, hits another ball of mass 20 kg which is at rest. One piece starts moving along y -axis with a speed of 10 m s-1. The second piece starts moving at an angle of 30° with respect to the x -axis.
